installConfigs.instructions: Replace <your-exa-api-key> with an Exa API key from https://dashboard.exa.ai/. The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Provides neural and keyword web search, content retrieval, and similarity tools via the Exa search API.

Replace <your-exa-api-key> with an Exa API key from https://dashboard.exa.ai/. The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Provides neural and keyword web search, content retrieval, and similarity tools via the Exa search API.
